title: Dream‚ėÜJumbo‚ėÜGirl
synopsis: Chie is a girl really anxious about her future and aims for Tokyo University, Kanae is quite a silly girl. One day Kanae decides to buy plenty of lottery tickets, and they hit the first prize! Which means they won 700 millions yens ?! Such a sudden pressure makes Chie unable to concentrate on her exams... Now she's desperate !! With all that money in her pocket she's going to enjoy her life at the fullest ! A money and girls comedy that begins by hitting the jackpot at the lottery !! (Source: Magazine Pocket, translated)

title: How to Love a Loser
synopsis: Shinba has no talent, no job, no money...he's a complete loser. However, he has a girlfriend, Hizumi who is beautiful, smart, good at her work. He has no idea why she says she likes him. He's almost scared, but loves Hizumi so much...he asks Hizumi, "Why do you want to date with someone like me?" She answers..."You always oversleep, talk about some video games I don't even know about, sing lame songs no one knows at karaoke, gave me a toy ring as a gift. Your face is always gloomy as hell. But...looking at such face makes me happy, Shinba. I love you, ha ha." Is she telling the truth? Hizumi must have some kind of a secret, Shinba thinks. He wants to find out...but maybe he shouldn't. (Source: BookWalker)

synopsis: A world where the worth of one's life is decided by one's Level. Theo, an S-Rank adventurer, had reincarnated thousand years later in a future where the people had forgotten about the power called "Level Up." In this world where a person would be Level 1 at birth, humanity is persecuted as the weakest race and the people lived everyday while fearing the danger of monsters. However, in their midst only Theo, who was chosen to be a sacrifice for the monsters, knew that humans can become the strongest because only they have the ability to Level Up.

The three woke up in a place similar to a prison and found that many strange people were imprisoned there. In order to escape, they teamed up with the perverted robot, the crazy and thrill-seeking Irlin with telekinetic ability, and the autistic but defensive Tolby. Aoi was taken aback to learn that the inept Fumiya was behind the username "nanashi," and she became determined to assist him in winning the "greatest game of all." With Aoi's help, Fumiya begins to progress in the wonderful "game of life" by overcoming the harsh challenges of social interaction and human relationships.
